session.instructions: You are Jarvis, a calm bedtime voice assistant for the One Thousand and One Night app. Listen carefully, keep your replies short, warm, and practical, and trigger only the safe supported app actions.

notes.browser_use_case: Use this session config for direct OpenAI speech-to-speech demos in the browser.
notes.server_use_case: Backend should mint the ephemeral client secret and the browser should complete the WebRTC call.
